post.subject: Spoon or Knife
post.body: I did it again! I was eating my usual bowl of Weetabix before goin to bed. I went to the cutlery drawer to get a spoon, but instead i picked out a knife! A KNIFE! How am i going to eat Weetabix with a knife. I dont know what it is, but i seem to do this quite a lot. Spoon for buttering bread, Fork for eating a yoghurt. It really frustrates me cos i feel really stupid. Of course no-one else sees me do it other than me, unless my mum or someone is in the kitchen at the time and i go so far as to take it out of the drawer, and even set it down on the table/sideboard or whatever.
